markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 682. Admin. Adjudication of Vehicle Parking & Stopping Offenses
##### § 682.005 — Enforcement of Order Concerning Witnesses and Documents

A municipal court may enforce an order of the hearing officer compelling the attendance of a witness or the production of a document.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A municipal court may enforce an order of the hearing officer compelling the attendance of a witness or the production of a document.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
